Table MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG

Card of table MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG

Name

MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG

Code

MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG

'---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

SELECT distinct

events_products_code AS PRODUCT_CODE_BK,

events_products_variants_code AS PRODUCT_VARIANT_CODE_BK,

events_country_code AS COUNTRY_CODE_BK,

events_country_description_en AS COUNTRY_DESCRIPTION,

events_defaultLanguage_code AS DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_CODE,

events_defaultLanguage_description_en AS DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_DESCRIPTION,

events_currencies_code AS CURRENCY_CODE,

events_currencies_description_en AS CURRENCY_DESCRIPTION,

events_products_actualContentUnits AS PRODUCT_ACTUAL_CONTENT_UNIT,

events_products_approvalStatusCode AS PRODUCT_APPROVAL_STATUS_CODE,

events_products_brand_brandCode AS PRODUCT_BRAND_CODE,

events_products_brand_brandDescriptions_en AS PRODUCT_BRAND_DESCRIPTION,

events_products_brand_brandFamilyName AS PRODUCT_BRAND_FAMILY_NAME,

events_products_brand_externalBrandCode AS PRODUCT_EXTERNAL_BRAND_CODE,

events_products_color_code AS PRODUCT_COLOR_CODE,

events_products_color_colorGroupData_code AS PRODUCT_COLOR_GROUP_CODE,

events_products_color_colorGroupData_hexCode AS PRODUCT_COLOR_GROUP_HEX_CODE,

events_products_color_colorGroupData_name_en AS PRODUCT_COLOR_GROUP_NAME,

events_products_color_description_en AS PRODUCT_COLOR_DESCRIPTION,

events_products_color_hexCode AS PRODUCT_COLOR_HEX_CODE,

events_products_comingSoon AS PRODUCT_COMING_SOON_FLAG,

events_products_defaultCategory_code AS PRODUCT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_CODE,

events_products_defaultCategory_description_en AS PRODUCT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION,

events_products_defaultCategory_externalCode AS PRODUCT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_EXTERNAL_CODE,

events_products_description_en AS PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION,

events_products_deviceVersion AS PRODUCT_DEVICE_VERSION,

events_products_ean AS PRODUCT_EAN,

events_products_edition_en AS PRODUCT_EDITION,

events_products_flavour_en AS PRODUCT_FLAVOUR,

events_products_isProductShippable AS PRODUCT_PRODUCT_SHIPPABLE_FLAG,

events_products_isRedemptionEligible AS PRODUCT_REDEMPTION_ELIGIBLE_FLAG,

events_products_isReviewable AS PRODUCT_REVIEWABLE_FLAG,

events_products_isRewardEligible AS PRODUCT_REWARD_ELIGIBLE_FLAG,

events_products_isSoldIndividually AS PRODUCT_SOLD_INDIVIDUALLY_FLAG,

events_products_isVisibleOnlyAfterHAV AS PRODUCT_HARD_AGE_VERIFICATION_VISIBILITY_FLAG,

events_products_maxOrderQuantity AS PRODUCT_MAX_ORDER_QUANTITY,

events_products_minOrderQuantity AS PRODUCT_MIN_ORDER_QUANTITY,

events_products_model AS PRODUCT_MODEL,

events_products_name_en AS PRODUCT_NAME,

events_products_nicotineLevel_en AS PRODUCT_NICOTINE_LEVEL,

events_products_numberContentUnits AS PRODUCT_NUMBER_CONTENT_UNIT,

events_products_offlineDate AS PRODUCT_OFFLINE_DATETIME,

events_products_onlineDate AS PRODUCT_ONLINE_DATETIME,

events_products_platform AS PRODUCT_PLATFORM,

events_products_pmiProductCategory AS PRODUCT_PMI_PRODUCT_CATEGORY,

events_products_pmiProductCode AS PRODUCT_PMI_PRODUCT_CODE,

events_products_pmiSellableProductCode AS PRODUCT_PMI_SELLABLE_PRODUCT_CODE,

events_products_preOrderDateUntil AS PRODUCT_PRE_ORDER_END_DATETIME,

events_products_priceQuantity AS PRODUCT_PRICE_QUANTITY,

events_products_productDetails_en AS PRODUCT_PRODUCT_DETAIL,

events_products_productUrl AS PRODUCT_PRODUCT_URL,

events_products_puffs_en AS PRODUCT_PUFF,

NVL(events_products_redemptionPoints,'') AS PRODUCT_REDEMPTION_POINT,

events_products_seoDescription_en AS PRODUCT_SEO_DESCRIPTION,

events_products_seoTitle_en AS PRODUCT_SEO_TITLE,

events_products_seoURL_en AS PRODUCT_SEO_URL,

events_products_shortDescription_en AS PRODUCT_SHORT_DESCRIPTION,

NVL(events_products_statusPoints,'') AS PRODUCT_STATUS_POINT,

events_products_subjectedToRegistration AS PRODUCT_SUBJECTED_TO_REGISTRATION_FLAG,

events_products_tankSize AS PRODUCT_TANK_SIZE,

events_products_technicalDetails_en AS PRODUCT_TECHNICAL_DETAIL,

events_products_type AS PRODUCT_TYPE,

events_products_unit_code AS PRODUCT_UNIT_CODE,

events_products_unit_description_en AS PRODUCT_UNIT_DESCRIPTION,

events_products_veevTankSize_en AS PRODUCT_VEEV_TANK_SIZE,

events_products_warrantyInformation_en AS PRODUCT_WARRANTY_INFORMATION,

events_products_variants_actualContentUnits AS VARIANT_ACTUAL_CONTENT_UNIT,

events_products_variants_approvalStatusCode AS VARIANT_APPROVAL_STATUS_CODE,

events_products_variants_brand_brandCode AS VARIANT_BRAND_CODE,

events_products_variants_brand_brandDescriptions_en AS VARIANT_BRAND_DESCRIPTION,

events_products_variants_brand_brandFamilyName AS VARIANT_BRAND_FAMILY_NAME,

events_products_variants_brand_externalBrandCode AS VARIANT_EXTERNAL_BRAND_CODE,

events_products_variants_color_code AS VARIANT_COLOR_CODE,

events_products_variants_color_colorGroupData_code AS VARIANT_COLOR_GROUP_CODE,

events_products_variants_color_colorGroupData_hexCode AS VARIANT_COLOR_GROUP_HEX_CODE,

events_products_variants_color_colorGroupData_name_en AS VARIANT_COLOR_GROUP_NAME,

events_products_variants_color_description_en AS VARIANT_COLOR_DESCRIPTION,

events_products_variants_color_hexCode AS VARIANT_COLOR_HEX_CODE,

events_products_variants_comingSoon AS VARIANT_COMING_SOON_FLAG,

events_products_variants_defaultCategory_code AS VARIANT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_CODE,

events_products_variants_defaultCategory_description_en AS VARIANT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION,

events_products_variants_defaultCategory_externalCode AS VARIANT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_EXTERNAL_CODE,

events_products_variants_description_en AS VARIANT_DESCRIPTION,

events_products_variants_deviceVersion AS VARIANT_DEVICE_VERSION,

events_products_variants_ean AS VARIANT_EAN,

events_products_variants_edition_en AS VARIANT_EDITION,

events_products_variants_flavour_en AS VARIANT_FLAVOUR,

events_products_variants_isProductShippable AS VARIANT_PRODUCT_SHIPPABLE_FLAG,

events_products_variants_isRedemptionEligible AS VARIANT_REDEMPTION_ELIGIBLE_FLAG,

events_products_variants_isReviewable AS VARIANT_REVIEWABLE_FLAG,

events_products_variants_isRewardEligible AS VARIANT_REWARD_ELIGIBLE_FLAG,

events_products_variants_isSoldIndividually AS VARIANT_SOLD_INDIVIDUALLY_FLAG,

events_products_variants_isVisibleOnlyAfterHAV AS VARIANT_HARD_AGE_VERIFICATION_VISIBILITY_FLAG,

events_products_variants_maxOrderQuantity AS VARIANT_MAX_ORDER_QUANTITY,

events_products_variants_minOrderQuantity AS VARIANT_MIN_ORDER_QUANTITY,

events_products_variants_model AS VARIANT_MODEL,

events_products_variants_name_en AS VARIANT_NAME,

events_products_variants_nicotineLevel_en AS VARIANT_NICOTINE_LEVEL,

events_products_variants_numberContentUnits AS VARIANT_NUMBER_CONTENT_UNIT,

events_products_variants_offlineDate AS VARIANT_OFFLINE_DATETIME,

events_products_variants_onlineDate AS VARIANT_ONLINE_DATETIME,

events_products_variants_platform AS VARIANT_PLATFORM,

events_products_variants_pmiProductCategory AS VARIANT_PMI_PRODUCT_CATEGORY,

events_products_variants_pmiProductCode AS VARIANT_PMI_PRODUCT_CODE,

events_products_variants_pmiSellableProductCode AS VARIANT_PMI_SELLABLE_PRODUCT_CODE,

events_products_variants_preOrderDateUntil AS VARIANT_PRE_ORDER_END_DATETIME,

events_products_variants_priceQuantity AS VARIANT_PRICE_QUANTITY,

events_products_variants_productDetails_en AS VARIANT_PRODUCT_DETAIL,

events_products_variants_productUrl AS VARIANT_PRODUCT_URL,

events_products_variants_puffs_en AS VARIANT_PUFF,

NVL(events_products_variants_redemptionPoints,'') AS VARIANT_REDEMPTION_POINT,

events_products_variants_seoDescription_en AS VARIANT_SEO_DESCRIPTION,

events_products_variants_seoTitle_en AS VARIANT_SEO_TITLE,

events_products_variants_seoURL_en AS VARIANT_SEO_URL,

events_products_variants_shortDescription_en AS VARIANT_SHORT_DESCRIPTION,

NVL(events_products_variants_statusPoints,'') AS VARIANT_STATUS_POINT,

events_products_variants_subjectedToRegistration AS VARIANT_SUBJECTED_TO_REGISTRATION_FLAG,

events_products_variants_tankSize AS VARIANT_TANK_SIZE,

events_products_variants_technicalDetails_en AS VARIANT_TECHNICAL_DETAIL,

events_products_variants_type AS VARIANT_TYPE,

events_products_variants_unit_code AS VARIANT_UNIT_CODE,

events_products_variants_unit_description_en AS VARIANT_UNIT_DESCRIPTION,

events_products_variants_veevTankSize_en AS VARIANT_VEEV_TANK_SIZE,

events_products_variants_warrantyInformation_en AS VARIANT_WARRANTY_INFORMATION,

__LOAD_TS AS VALID_FROM

[remaining technical columns]

FROM DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE

Primary key(s) Target: COUNTRY_CODE_BK, PRODUCT_VARIANT_CODE_BK, PRODUCT_CODE_BK

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2

 

----------

RLS

----------

based on COUNTRY_CODE_BK (events_country_code)

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER


Check constraint name of the table MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG

CKT_MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG


Server validation rule of the table MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG

%RULES%


Code preview of the table MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG

drop table MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG
--==============================================================
create or replace table MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG (
PRODUCT_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
PRODUCT_VARIANT_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
COUNTRY_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
COUNTRY_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_CODE TEXT,
DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
CURRENCY_CODE TEXT,
CURRENCY_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
PRODUCT_ACTUAL_CONTENT_UNIT DECIMAL,
PRODUCT_APPROVAL_STATUS_CODE TEXT,
PRODUCT_BRAND_CODE TEXT,
PRODUCT_BRAND_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
PRODUCT_BRAND_FAMILY_NAME TEXT,
PRODUCT_EXTERNAL_BRAND_CODE TEXT,
PRODUCT_COLOR_CODE TEXT,
PRODUCT_COLOR_GROUP_CODE TEXT,
PRODUCT_COLOR_GROUP_HEX_CODE TEXT,
PRODUCT_COLOR_GROUP_NAME TEXT,
PRODUCT_COLOR_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
PRODUCT_COLOR_HEX_CODE TEXT,
PRODUCT_COMING_SOON_FLAG FLAG,
PRODUCT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_CODE TEXT,
PRODUCT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
PRODUCT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_EXTERNAL_CODE TEXT,
PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
PRODUCT_DEVICE_VERSION TEXT,
PRODUCT_EAN TEXT,
PRODUCT_EDITION TEXT,
PRODUCT_FLAVOUR TEXT,
PRODUCT_PRODUCT_SHIPPABLE_FLAG FLAG,
PRODUCT_REDEMPTION_ELIGIBLE_FLAG FLAG,
PRODUCT_REVIEWABLE_FLAG FLAG,
PRODUCT_REWARD_ELIGIBLE_FLAG FLAG,
PRODUCT_SOLD_INDIVIDUALLY_FLAG FLAG,
PRODUCT_HARD_AGE_VERIFICATION_VISIBILITY_FLAG FLAG,
PRODUCT_MAX_ORDER_QUANTITY INTEGER,
PRODUCT_MIN_ORDER_QUANTITY INTEGER,
PRODUCT_MODEL TEXT,
PRODUCT_NAME TEXT,
PRODUCT_NICOTINE_LEVEL TEXT,
PRODUCT_NUMBER_CONTENT_UNIT DECIMAL,
PRODUCT_OFFLINE_DATETIME DATETIME,
PRODUCT_ONLINE_DATETIME DATETIME,
PRODUCT_PLATFORM TEXT,
PRODUCT_PMI_PRODUCT_CATEGORY TEXT,
PRODUCT_PMI_PRODUCT_CODE TEXT,
PRODUCT_PMI_SELLABLE_PRODUCT_CODE TEXT,
PRODUCT_PRE_ORDER_END_DATETIME DATETIME,
PRODUCT_PRICE_QUANTITY DECIMAL,
PRODUCT_PRODUCT_DETAIL TEXT,
PRODUCT_PRODUCT_URL TEXT,
PRODUCT_PUFF TEXT,
PRODUCT_REDEMPTION_POINT DECIMAL,
PRODUCT_SEO_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
PRODUCT_SEO_TITLE TEXT,
PRODUCT_SEO_URL TEXT,
PRODUCT_SHORT_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
PRODUCT_STATUS_POINT DECIMAL,
PRODUCT_SUBJECTED_TO_REGISTRATION_FLAG FLAG,
PRODUCT_TANK_SIZE TEXT,
PRODUCT_TECHNICAL_DETAIL TEXT,
PRODUCT_TYPE TEXT,
PRODUCT_UNIT_CODE TEXT,
PRODUCT_UNIT_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
PRODUCT_VEEV_TANK_SIZE TEXT,
PRODUCT_WARRANTY_INFORMATION TEXT,
VARIANT_ACTUAL_CONTENT_UNIT DECIMAL,
VARIANT_APPROVAL_STATUS_CODE TEXT,
VARIANT_BRAND_CODE TEXT,
VARIANT_BRAND_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
VARIANT_BRAND_FAMILY_NAME TEXT,
VARIANT_EXTERNAL_BRAND_CODE TEXT,
VARIANT_COLOR_CODE TEXT,
VARIANT_COLOR_GROUP_CODE TEXT,
VARIANT_COLOR_GROUP_HEX_CODE TEXT,
VARIANT_COLOR_GROUP_NAME TEXT,
VARIANT_COLOR_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
VARIANT_COLOR_HEX_CODE TEXT,
VARIANT_COMING_SOON_FLAG FLAG,
VARIANT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_CODE TEXT,
VARIANT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
VARIANT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_EXTERNAL_CODE TEXT,
VARIANT_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
VARIANT_DEVICE_VERSION TEXT,
VARIANT_EAN TEXT,
VARIANT_EDITION TEXT,
VARIANT_FLAVOUR TEXT,
VARIANT_PRODUCT_SHIPPABLE_FLAG FLAG,
VARIANT_REDEMPTION_ELIGIBLE_FLAG FLAG,
VARIANT_REVIEWABLE_FLAG FLAG,
VARIANT_REWARD_ELIGIBLE_FLAG FLAG,
VARIANT_SOLD_INDIVIDUALLY_FLAG FLAG,
VARIANT_HARD_AGE_VERIFICATION_VISIBILITY_FLAG FLAG,
VARIANT_MAX_ORDER_QUANTITY INTEGER,
VARIANT_MIN_ORDER_QUANTITY INTEGER,
VARIANT_MODEL TEXT,
VARIANT_NAME TEXT,
VARIANT_NICOTINE_LEVEL TEXT,
VARIANT_NUMBER_CONTENT_UNIT DECIMAL,
VARIANT_OFFLINE_DATETIME DATETIME,
VARIANT_ONLINE_DATETIME DATETIME,
VARIANT_PLATFORM TEXT,
VARIANT_PMI_PRODUCT_CATEGORY TEXT,
VARIANT_PMI_PRODUCT_CODE TEXT,
VARIANT_PMI_SELLABLE_PRODUCT_CODE TEXT,
VARIANT_PRE_ORDER_END_DATETIME DATETIME,
VARIANT_PRICE_QUANTITY DECIMAL,
VARIANT_PRODUCT_DETAIL TEXT,
VARIANT_PRODUCT_URL TEXT,
VARIANT_PUFF TEXT,
VARIANT_REDEMPTION_POINT DECIMAL,
VARIANT_SEO_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
VARIANT_SEO_TITLE TEXT,
VARIANT_SEO_URL TEXT,
VARIANT_SHORT_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
VARIANT_STATUS_POINT DECIMAL,
VARIANT_SUBJECTED_TO_REGISTRATION_FLAG FLAG,
VARIANT_TANK_SIZE TEXT,
VARIANT_TECHNICAL_DETAIL TEXT,
VARIANT_TYPE TEXT,
VARIANT_UNIT_CODE TEXT,
VARIANT_UNIT_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
VARIANT_VEEV_TANK_SIZE TEXT,
VARIANT_WARRANTY_INFORMATION TEXT,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG primary key (COUNTRY_CODE_BK, PRODUCT_VARIANT_CODE_BK, PRODUCT_CODE_BK)
not enforced
);

alter table MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG set comment = 'Master data entity representing a product as marketed by the organization - together with its specific variants - covering the key product code and (where applicable) the distinct variant code; descriptive attributes (e.g., category, flavor, device version), variant characteristics (e.g., color, size, nicotine level), technical details, pricing/quantity, and regulatory or commercial flags. It provides the complete set of properties needed for product and variant identification, governance, and lifecycle management.';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_CODE_BK is
'Code of the product (events_products_code )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_VARIANT_CODE_BK is
'Code of the variant product (events_products_variants_code )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.COUNTRY_CODE_BK is
'Country where the product is available (events_country_code )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.COUNTRY_DESCRIPTION is
'Description of the country of the consumer  (events_country_description_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_CODE is
'Short code of default language (events_defaultLanguage_code )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_DESCRIPTION is
'Description of default language (events_defaultLanguage_description_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.CURRENCY_CODE is
'Code of the currencies (events_currencies_code )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.CURRENCY_DESCRIPTION is
'Currencies description (events_currencies_description_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_ACTUAL_CONTENT_UNIT is
'Nominal content per sales unit for product (events_products_actualContentUnits )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_APPROVAL_STATUS_CODE is
'Status code for product approval (events_products_approvalStatusCode )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_BRAND_CODE is
'Brand code for product (events_products_brand_brandCode )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_BRAND_DESCRIPTION is
'Brand description of the product variant (events_products_brand_brandDescriptions_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_BRAND_FAMILY_NAME is
'gives more accurate information about the brand family of the devices (for example: IQOS, VEEV, IQOS ILUMA, .. ) (events_products_brand_brandFamilyName )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_EXTERNAL_BRAND_CODE is
'External brand code for product (events_products_brand_externalBrandCode )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_COLOR_CODE is
'Color code (events_products_color_code )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_COLOR_GROUP_CODE is
'Unique code for product color group (events_products_color_colorGroupData_code )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_COLOR_GROUP_HEX_CODE is
'Hexadecimal code for product color group (events_products_color_colorGroupData_hexCode )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_COLOR_GROUP_NAME is
'Name of the color group in English for product (events_products_color_colorGroupData_name_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_COLOR_DESCRIPTION is
'Description of the product in english (events_products_color_description_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_COLOR_HEX_CODE is
'The code HEX value (events_products_color_hexCode )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_COMING_SOON_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if base product is coming soon (events_products_comingSoon )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_CODE is
'Default category that the product belongs to (events_products_defaultCategory_code )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION is
'Default category description of the product (events_products_defaultCategory_description_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_EXTERNAL_CODE is
'Default category that the product belongs to (external) (events_products_defaultCategory_externalCode )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION is
'Description of the product (events_products_description_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_DEVICE_VERSION is
'Version of the device, (events_products_deviceVersion )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_EAN is
'EAN code (events_products_ean )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_EDITION is
'English name for product edition (events_products_edition_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_FLAVOUR is
'Flavour of the base product (events_products_flavour_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_PRODUCT_SHIPPABLE_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if product is ready to be shipped (events_products_isProductShippable )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_REDEMPTION_ELIGIBLE_FLAG is
'It identifies if a product is eligible for redemption for product (events_products_isRedemptionEligible )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_REVIEWABLE_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if base product is ready to be reviewed (events_products_isReviewable )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_REWARD_ELIGIBLE_FLAG is
'It identifies if a product is eligible for Reward for product (events_products_isRewardEligible )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_SOLD_INDIVIDUALLY_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if base product can be sold separately (events_products_isSoldIndividually )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_HARD_AGE_VERIFICATION_VISIBILITY_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if product is visible only after hard age verification is done (events_products_isVisibleOnlyAfterHAV )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_MAX_ORDER_QUANTITY is
'Maximum number of products that can be purchased in a single order (events_products_maxOrderQuantity )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_MIN_ORDER_QUANTITY is
'Minimum number of products that can be purchased in a single order (events_products_minOrderQuantity )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_MODEL is
'Model of the base product (events_products_model )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_NAME is
'English name of the base product purchased (events_products_name_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_NICOTINE_LEVEL is
'Nicotine level of the product (events_products_nicotineLevel_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_NUMBER_CONTENT_UNIT is
'Nominal content per sales unit for product (events_products_numberContentUnits )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_OFFLINE_DATETIME is
'Date when product is decommissioned (events_products_offlineDate )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_ONLINE_DATETIME is
'Date when product is active for sale (events_products_onlineDate )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_PLATFORM is
'The type of the SFP platform that base product belongs to (events_products_platform )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_PMI_PRODUCT_CATEGORY is
'Product category (events_products_pmiProductCategory )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_PMI_PRODUCT_CODE is
'This is the product id as it exists in the PMI SAP system. (events_products_pmiProductCode )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_PMI_SELLABLE_PRODUCT_CODE is
'Local ID of the product (events_products_pmiSellableProductCode )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_PRE_ORDER_END_DATETIME is
'Date until when base product that can be pre-ordered (events_products_preOrderDateUntil )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_PRICE_QUANTITY is
'Number of base products that can be sold (events_products_priceQuantity )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_PRODUCT_DETAIL is
'Details about the base product in English (events_products_productDetails_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_PRODUCT_URL is
'Link for the base product info on PMI website (events_products_productUrl )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_PUFF is
'Number of puffs (events_products_puffs_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_REDEMPTION_POINT is
'Loyalty points that are used to reward the consumer based on her actions. These points can be used as discount while purchasing device or accessories. (events_products_redemptionPoints )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_SEO_DESCRIPTION is
'Description of the base product in English that is shown in search engines (events_products_seoDescription_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_SEO_TITLE is
'Title of the base product description in English that is shown in search engines (events_products_seoTitle_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_SEO_URL is
'Product url for SEO requirements (events_products_seoURL_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_SHORT_DESCRIPTION is
'Short description of the product in English (events_products_shortDescription_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_STATUS_POINT is
'Status Points earned or deducted for activity (events_products_statusPoints )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_SUBJECTED_TO_REGISTRATION_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if base product is subject for registration (events_products_subjectedToRegistration )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_TANK_SIZE is
'Tank size of the device (events_products_tankSize )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_TECHNICAL_DETAIL is
'Technical details of the base product in English (events_products_technicalDetails_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_TYPE is
'Type of base product (apparel product, service fee product, etc.) (events_products_type )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_UNIT_CODE is
'Sales unit for the base product (events_products_unit_code )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_UNIT_DESCRIPTION is
'Sales unit description for the product (events_products_unit_description_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_VEEV_TANK_SIZE is
'Tank size of the Veev (events_products_veevTankSize_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.PRODUCT_WARRANTY_INFORMATION is
'Warranty Information (events_products_warrantyInformation_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_ACTUAL_CONTENT_UNIT is
'Nominal content per sales unit for variant product (events_products_variants_actualContentUnits )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_APPROVAL_STATUS_CODE is
'Status code of the variant approval (events_products_variants_approvalStatusCode )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_BRAND_CODE is
'Code of the product variant that the product identification, typically a barcode, is linked to. (events_products_variants_brand_brandCode )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_BRAND_DESCRIPTION is
'Brand description of the product variant (events_products_variants_brand_brandDescriptions_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_BRAND_FAMILY_NAME is
'Brand family of the product variant (events_products_variants_brand_brandFamilyName )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_EXTERNAL_BRAND_CODE is
'Brand code for variant product (external) (events_products_variants_brand_externalBrandCode )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_COLOR_CODE is
'Short code of the color for the product variant (events_products_variants_color_code )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_COLOR_GROUP_CODE is
'Unique code for variant product color group (events_products_variants_color_colorGroupData_code )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_COLOR_GROUP_HEX_CODE is
'Color group hexadecimal code of the variant product (events_products_variants_color_colorGroupData_hexCode )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_COLOR_GROUP_NAME is
'Color group name in English for the variant product (extended value) (events_products_variants_color_colorGroupData_name_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_COLOR_DESCRIPTION is
'Description of the variant product color in english (events_products_variants_color_description_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_COLOR_HEX_CODE is
'Color Hexcode variant (events_products_variants_color_hexCode )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_COMING_SOON_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if variant product is coming soon (events_products_variants_comingSoon )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_CODE is
'Default category that the variant product belongs to (events_products_variants_defaultCategory_code )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION is
'Default category description of the variant product (events_products_variants_defaultCategory_description_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_DEFAULT_CATEGORY_EXTERNAL_CODE is
'Default category that the variant product belongs to (external) (events_products_variants_defaultCategory_externalCode )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_DESCRIPTION is
'Description of the variant product in English (events_products_variants_description_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_DEVICE_VERSION is
'Version of the product bought by consumers. From Product Catalog. (events_products_variants_deviceVersion )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_EAN is
'EAN code (events_products_variants_ean )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_EDITION is
'Specific edition of the product variant (events_products_variants_edition_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_FLAVOUR is
'Flavour of the variant product (events_products_variants_flavour_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_PRODUCT_SHIPPABLE_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if variant product is ready to be shipped (events_products_variants_isProductShippable )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_REDEMPTION_ELIGIBLE_FLAG is
'It identifies if a product is eligible for redemption for variant product (events_products_variants_isRedemptionEligible )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_REVIEWABLE_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if variant product is ready to be reviewed (events_products_variants_isReviewable )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_REWARD_ELIGIBLE_FLAG is
'It identifies if a product is eligible for Reward for variant product (events_products_variants_isRewardEligible )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_SOLD_INDIVIDUALLY_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if variant product can be sold separately (events_products_variants_isSoldIndividually )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_HARD_AGE_VERIFICATION_VISIBILITY_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if variant product is visible only after hard age verification is done (events_products_variants_isVisibleOnlyAfterHAV )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_MAX_ORDER_QUANTITY is
'Maximum number of variant products that can be purchased in a single order (events_products_variants_maxOrderQuantity )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_MIN_ORDER_QUANTITY is
'Minimum number of variant products that can be purchased in a single order (events_products_variants_minOrderQuantity )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_MODEL is
'Model of the variant (events_products_variants_model )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_NAME is
'Extended name of the variant product in English (events_products_variants_name_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_NICOTINE_LEVEL is
'Nicotine level of the variant product (events_products_variants_nicotineLevel_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_NUMBER_CONTENT_UNIT is
'Nominal content per sales unit for variant product (events_products_variants_numberContentUnits )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_OFFLINE_DATETIME is
'Date when variant product is decommissioned (events_products_variants_offlineDate )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_ONLINE_DATETIME is
'Date when variant product is active for sale (events_products_variants_onlineDate )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_PLATFORM is
'product platform (events_products_variants_platform )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_PMI_PRODUCT_CATEGORY is
'Variant product category code  (events_products_variants_pmiProductCategory )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_PMI_PRODUCT_CODE is
'PMI internal product code. (events_products_variants_pmiProductCode )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_PMI_SELLABLE_PRODUCT_CODE is
'Sellable code for variant product (events_products_variants_pmiSellableProductCode )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_PRE_ORDER_END_DATETIME is
'Date until when product variant that can be pre-ordered (events_products_variants_preOrderDateUntil )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_PRICE_QUANTITY is
'Number of product variants that can be sold (events_products_variants_priceQuantity )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_PRODUCT_DETAIL is
'Details about the product variant in English (events_products_variants_productDetails_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_PRODUCT_URL is
'Link for the product variant info on PMI website (events_products_variants_productUrl )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_PUFF is
'Number of puffs (events_products_variants_puffs_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_REDEMPTION_POINT is
'Loyalty points that are used to reward the consumer based on her actions. These points can be used as discount while purchasing device or accessories. (events_products_variants_redemptionPoints )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_SEO_DESCRIPTION is
'Description of the product variant in English that is shown in search engines (events_products_variants_seoDescription_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_SEO_TITLE is
'Title of the product variant description in English that is shown in search engines (events_products_variants_seoTitle_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_SEO_URL is
'Variant product url for SEO (events_products_variants_seoURL_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_SHORT_DESCRIPTION is
'Short description of the variant product in English (events_products_variants_shortDescription_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_STATUS_POINT is
'Status Points earned or deducted for activity (events_products_variants_statusPoints )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_SUBJECTED_TO_REGISTRATION_FLAG is
'Indicator that shows if product variant is subject for registration (events_products_variants_subjectedToRegistration )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_TANK_SIZE is
'Variant tank size of the device (events_products_variants_tankSize )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_TECHNICAL_DETAIL is
'Technical details of the product variant in English (events_products_variants_technicalDetails_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_TYPE is
'Type of variant product (events_products_variants_type )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_UNIT_CODE is
'Sales product unit of measurement (events_products_variants_unit_code )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_UNIT_DESCRIPTION is
'Sales unit description for the variant product (events_products_variants_unit_description_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_VEEV_TANK_SIZE is
'Tank size of the variant Veev (events_products_variants_veevTankSize_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VARIANT_WARRANTY_INFORMATION is
'Information about warranty for variant product (events_products_variants_warrantyInformation_en )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active (VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. )';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VALID_TO is
'It indicates till when the record is Active (VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31)';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG.ACTIVE_FLAG is
' It indicates if the record is active (ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.)';
